description: Coulson is picked up by Rosalind Price for their scheduled ATCU visit, but she detours to her home due to an alleged break-in. Coulson quickly deduces the break-in may be staged to manipulate him emotionally and insists on seeing the ATCU facility instead. The scene heightens tension between the two leaders, as each tries to outmaneuver the other.

transcript.line: Nice of you to pick me up.
Yes. On the corner, since you won't tell me where your base is.
You know I run a spy organization, right?
I'm sorry. It's an emergency I need to handle. We'll reschedule. So, this is the part where you get out of the car.
Do you not get how this works?
What I get is that it's time to see this facility. No more delays. I'll stay with you. When the emergency's done, then we can go.
You can't. Not where I'm going.
Oh. So we're not sharing information, then? ‘Cause you kind of just made a whole thing about that.
Okay. Director Coulson will be joining us. Take me home.
